org.arakhne.neteditor.io

Class AbstractVectorialExporterGraphics2D

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.afc.ui.vector.AbstractVectorGraphics2D
      • org.arakhne.neteditor.io.AbstractVectorialExporterGraphics2D
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    VectorGraphics2D, ViewGraphics2D
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    EpsGraphics2D, PdfGraphics2D, SvgGraphics2D

    public abstract class AbstractVectorialExporterGraphics2D
extends AbstractVectorGraphics2D
implements ViewGraphics2D
    Abstract implementation of a VectorGraphics2D dedicated to vector exporters.
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:04
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-io

      • prolog

        public void prolog()
            throws IOException
        Invoked to export the prolog for the target format. This function should be overridden by subclasses to export a prolog into the target document.
        Throws:
        IOException

        Invoked to export the epilog for the target format. This function should be overridden by subclasses to export a epilog into the target document.

      • pushRenderingContext

        public final void pushRenderingContext(Figure component,
                        Transform2D localTransformation)
        Start a rendering context for a sub-component but with the specified local transformation.
        Specified by:
        pushRenderingContext in interface ViewGraphics2D
        Parameters:
        component - is the component to paint for.
        localTransformation - is the local transformation to apply to.

      • pushRenderingContext

        public final void pushRenderingContext(Figure component,
                        Shape2f viewShape,
                        Rectangle2f bounds)
        Start a rendering context for a component.
        Specified by:
        pushRenderingContext in interface ViewGraphics2D
        Parameters:
        component - is the component to paint for.
        viewShape - is the shape of the component. It could be null to use the specified bounds.
        bounds - are the bounds of the component, never null.

      • pushRenderingContext

        public final void pushRenderingContext(Figure component,
                        Shape2f viewShape,
                        Rectangle2f bounds,
                        Color fillColor,
                        Color lineColor)
        Start a rendering context for a component.
        Specified by:
        pushRenderingContext in interface ViewGraphics2D
        Parameters:
        component - is the component to paint for.
        viewShape - is the shape of the component. It could be null to use the specified bounds.
        bounds - are the bounds of the component, never null.
        fillColor - is the color to use to fill the objects.
        lineColor - is the color to use to draw the outlines of the objects.

      • pushRenderingContext

        public final void pushRenderingContext(Figure component,
                        Color fillColor,
                        Color lineColor)
        Start a rendering context for a sub-component but this the specified local transformation.
        Specified by:
        pushRenderingContext in interface ViewGraphics2D
        Parameters:
        component - is the component to paint for.
        fillColor - is the color to use to fill the objects.
        lineColor - is the color to use to draw the outlines of the objects.

      • pushRenderingContext

        public void pushRenderingContext(Figure component,
                        Shape2f viewShape,
                        Rectangle2f bounds,
                        Color fillColor,
                        Color lineColor,
                        Transform2D localTransformation)
        Start a rendering context for a component.
        Specified by:
        pushRenderingContext in interface ViewGraphics2D
        Parameters:
        component - is the component to paint for.
        viewShape - is the shape of the component. It could be null to use the specified bounds.
        bounds - are the bounds of the component, never null.
        fillColor - is the color to use to fill the objects.
        lineColor - is the color to use to draw the outlines of the objects.
        localTransformation - is the local transformation to apply to.
